purpose: Shared sample plan for active 3R model smoke tests and cross-model evaluation.

samples.purpose: Two-image static baseline already validated through MASt3R; useful for export, inspector, and static pipeline regression checks.
manual_criteria: Two views should have clear overlap and parallax.
MASt3R pointcloud and match visualization should remain inspectable.
Use as a quick static sanity check before larger 3R comparison samples.

samples.purpose: Static multi-view reconstruction baseline for MASt3R and Spann3R.
manual_criteria: Overlapping textured regions are visible in every view.
Camera motion has parallax rather than only in-place rotation.
Object or room structure should be easy to judge by eye.

samples.purpose: Medium image collection for Fast3R speed and Spann3R consistency tests.
manual_criteria: Images should cover a connected scene or object.
Sequence should not contain large unrelated jumps.
Expected output should be inspectable as one point cloud.

samples.purpose: Short mostly-static video baseline for MonST3R, Align3R, and CUT3R.
manual_criteria: Camera should translate enough to create parallax.
Background should be stable and textured.
Dynamic objects should not dominate the frame.

samples.purpose: Dynamic-scene comparison for MonST3R, Align3R, and CUT3R.
manual_criteria: At least one moving object or person is visible.
Camera motion should remain smooth enough for geometry recovery.
Scene should still contain stable background structure.
May include weak texture, reflective surfaces, fast motion, or occlusion.
Should be hard but not completely impossible to inspect.
Used for failure explanation rather than best showcase.
